name: The Adventure of TED  and the lost magic crystals
short_description: A cozy journey through a world of color. Join TED in this relaxing 2.5D platformer as he jumps, explores, and fights to save the Squirrel Kingdom. Solve relaxing puzzles and discover hidden treasures.
detailed_description:
The Adventures of TED and the Lost Magic Crystals

A cozy journey through a world of color.

Join TED in this relaxing 2.5D platformer as he jumps, explores, and fights to save the Squirrel Kingdom. Solve relaxing puzzles and discover hidden treasures, but the adventure is huge. Can you find all the magic crystals before it's too late?
Features:

• 31 levels packed with fun and variety
Take on 31 unique levels, each offering its own twists, surprises, and platforming challenges. Whether you’re hopping across moving platforms or exploring calm forest paths, every stage is designed to keep the adventure feeling fresh and enjoyable from start to finish.

• Cinematic moments that bring the world to life
Throughout your journey, you’ll experience cinematic scenes that add personality to the world around you. These moments help shape TED’s adventure, making the story feel more alive without ever slowing down the gameplay.

• Hidden Key items and secrets chest waiting to be found
Fun little secrets for those who take the time to look around. It’s a great excuse to explore every corner and revisit your favorite stages.

• Big, exciting boss battles
Face off against giant bosses that turn the adventure more fun. Each boss has its own style and attack patterns, once you figure out how to take them down.

• Full controller support for Xbox and PlayStation
Enjoy the game the way classic platformers were meant to be played. With full controller support, TED’s adventure feels smooth, responsive, and comfortable whether you’re using an Xbox or PlayStation controller.

This cozy 2.5D platformer from RgamesID brings back the warm nostalgia of classic 32-bit era games. With its charming low-poly 3D look and simple, feel-good adventure style, it’s made to capture the fun of old-school platformers in a more relaxed, modern way. Explore colorful levels, enjoy the retro vibes, and soak in an experience that feels both familiar and fresh at the same time.
